evals.name: dwp-bank-siem-expert
evals.prompt: Ich habe nächste Woche ein Vorstellungsgespräch bei der Deutschen WertpapierService Bank (dwp-bank) für die Stelle 'Experte Informationssicherheit mit Schwerpunkt SIEM'. Kannst du mir die Interview-Vorbereitung schreiben? Die Unterlagen liegen in /Users/canystrix/dev/job-applications/dwp-bank/.
evals.expected_output: An interview-prep-dwp-bank.md and interview-prep-dwp-bank.docx file in /Users/canystrix/dev/job-applications/dwp-bank/ with all four sections in German, SIEM-specific technical questions, gaps that honestly address the lack of direct SIEM tool experience in Lutz's CV, and company-specific questions about dwp-bank.

evals.name: kpmg-consulting-financial-services
evals.prompt: Bitte bereite mich auf das Bewerbungsgespräch bei KPMG für die Rolle 'Senior Consultant Cyber Security Financial Services' vor. Application folder: /Users/canystrix/dev/job-applications/kpmg/.
evals.expected_output: interview-prep-kpmg.md and .docx covering consulting-specific questions (Kundenkommunikation, Projektakquise), financial-services regulatory knowledge (BAIT, MaRisk, DORA), honest acknowledgment that Lutz has no prior consulting experience, and KPMG-specific questions.

evals.name: qas-company-ag-senior-consultant
evals.prompt: Interview prep for the Senior Consultant Informationssicherheit role at QAS Company AG please — folder is /Users/canystrix/dev/job-applications/qas-company-ag/. Nur die PDF liegt vor, keine markdown-Version des Anschreibens.
evals.expected_output: interview-prep-qas-company-ag.md and .docx. Skill should handle the PDF-only Anschreiben by extracting with pdfplumber. Content should focus on senior consulting readiness, ISMS depth, and QAS-specific research questions.
